name: Jacques Brel
abstract: Jacques Romain Georges Brel (French: [ʒɑk ʁɔmɛ̃ ʒɔʁʒ bʁɛl] ; 8 April 1929 – 9 October 1978) was a Belgian singer and actor who composed and performed theatrical songs. He generated a large, devoted following—initially in Belgium and France, but later throughout the world.

works_created.t: Jacques Brel is Alive and Well and Living in Paris

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: Basie, Basie was kidding, but a little serious, he said, “Quincy, you’re not bringing that band home, are you?” ... We opened for Basie’s band, and Basie, Basie was kidding, but a little serious, he said, “Quincy, you’re not bringing that band home, are you?” [Both laugh] Because these, Basie’s band
